0x12EE177DB3cEafedc639D023A29CC8588DB3A4.name: Sushi
0x12EE177DB3cEafedc639D023A29CC8588DB3A4.description: Sushi is a decentralized exchange and automated market maker for swapping tokens, providing liquidity, and earning yield across many blockchain networks. It offers on-chain trading, pools, and cross-chain products such as SushiXSwap for users who prefer non-custodial DeFi.

0x1924b8561eeF20e70Ede628A296175D358BE80.name: Based
0x1924b8561eeF20e70Ede628A296175D358BE80.description: Based is a self-custodial trading and spending app for Hyperliquid markets and everyday payments: trade spot and perps in a web and mobile experience, and spend from crypto balances with a Visa card where supported. It targets active traders and on-chain users who want unified trading, wallet custody, and card spending in one place.

0x1cC34f6AF34653c515B47A83e1De70ba9B0CdA.name: Axiom
0x1cC34f6AF34653c515B47A83e1De70ba9B0CdA.description: Axiom is a non-custodial web trading terminal for Solana and DeFi: spot and memecoin flows, wallet and X (Twitter) tracking, limit orders, and integrations such as Hyperliquid perpetuals and yield partners. It targets active on-chain traders who want execution, discovery, and position monitoring in one interface rather than juggling multiple apps.

0x2868fC0d9786A740b491577A43502259eFA78a.name: Insilico Terminal
0x2868fC0d9786A740b491577A43502259eFA78a.description: Insilico Terminal is a web-based professional trading terminal for order, position, and execution management across major CEX and DEX venues, including Hyperliquid perps and spot. It combines a visual interface with a command-line style workflow and advanced institutional-style order types, and is free to use with API keys kept in the browser per its security model.

0x60dC8E3dAd2e4E0738e813B9cB09b9c00B5e0F.name: Rainbow
0x60dC8E3dAd2e4E0738e813B9cB09b9c00B5e0F.description: Rainbow is a self-custodial Ethereum and EVM wallet with mobile apps and a browser extension for managing tokens, NFTs, swaps, bridges, and hardware wallets (Ledger and Trezor). It is aimed at everyday on-chain users and traders who want a single interface across many networks, including those used with Hyperliquid via WalletConnect and standard EVM workflows.

0x999a4B5F268A8fBf33736FeFf360d462AD248D.name: tread.fi
0x999a4B5F268A8fBf33736FeFf360d462AD248D.description: tread.fi is an order execution management system (OEMS) and algorithmic trading terminal that connects to your existing CEX and DEX accounts so you can run execution algorithms, multi-leg orders, and real-time tracking from one interface. It supports Hyperliquid and other venues, optional REST API integration, and vCeFi for verifiable on-chain proofs of CeFi activity.

0xAd9bE64fD7a35d99a138b87CB212BAefbCDCf0.name: Rabby Wallet
0xAd9bE64fD7a35d99a138b87CB212BAefbCDCf0.description: Rabby Wallet is an open-source browser extension and companion mobile and desktop apps for Ethereum and EVM chains, focused on clearer transaction previews, multi-chain UX, and security-oriented workflows for DeFi users. It can be used like other EVM wallets to connect to dapps and trading interfaces, including those compatible with Hyperliquid when accessed through supported Web3 connections.

0xB84168Cf3be63c6b8dad05FF5d755E97432fF8.name: Phantom
0xB84168Cf3be63c6b8dad05FF5d755E97432fF8.description: Phantom is a wallet that allows you to store and transfer your assets.

0xe95A5e31904e005066614247D309e00D8AD753.name: MetaMask
0xe95A5e31904e005066614247D309e00D8AD753.description: MetaMask is a self-custody crypto wallet for buying, selling, swapping, and holding digital assets across multiple networks. It is developed as part of the Consensys product family and is widely used to connect to dapps and onchain services, including those compatible with Hyperliquid when accessed through supported interfaces.
